facts.text: Founded in the late 1800s, Williston’s deep agricultural roots still shape its local economy and community identity.
Located between Gainesville and Ocala, Williston serves as a convenient base for exploring Devil’s Den Prehistoric Spring and Blue Grotto Dive Resort.
Devil’s Den Prehistoric Spring is a privately operated spring inside a collapsed cave, offering a one‑of‑a‑kind setting for snorkeling and scuba diving.
Water temperatures at Devil’s Den stay around 72°F year‑round, a constant that attracts visitors to its clear, prehistoric waters.
Williston is part of the Gainesville, Florida Metropolitan Statistical Area, linking it to a larger regional economy.
Williston blends small‑town history, open countryside, and access to some of North Central Florida’s most distinctive outdoor attractions.
